evidence_commands: jq '.lanes[] | select(.fixture.source_stage=="15" and .fixture.target_stage=="20") | {lane_stage:(.fixture.source_stage + "->" + .fixture.target_stage), active_count_observed:(.commands[] | select(.command=="rollout stage advance 20 backend-reserve-advance-stage20-step --json") | .stdout_json.stage_advancement_result.delegated_evidence.pool_count_summary_after_step.active_count_observed), active_target:(.commands[] | select(.command=="rollout stage advance 20 backend-reserve-advance-stage20-step --json") | .stdout_json.stage_advancement_result.delegated_evidence.pool_count_summary_after_step.active_target), postflight_attestation_status:(.commands[] | select(.command=="rollout stage advance 20 backend-reserve-advance-stage20-step --json") | .stdout_json.stage_advancement_result.postflight_attestation_status), postflight_rotation_status:(.commands[] | select(.command=="rollout stage advance 20 backend-reserve-advance-stage20-step --json") | .stdout_json.stage_advancement_result.postflight_rotation_status), rollback_readiness_status:(.commands[] | select(.command=="rollout stage advance 20 backend-reserve-advance-stage20-step --json") | .stdout_json.stage_advancement_result.rollback_readiness_status)}' audit_results/step16_owner_surface_capture.json

jq '.lanes[] | select(.fixture.source_stage=="15" and .fixture.target_stage=="20") | (.commands[] | select(.command=="rollout stage advance 20 backend-reserve-advance-stage20-step --json") | .stdout_json.stage_advancement_result.delegated_evidence.postflight_summary.readiness_summary)' audit_results/step16_owner_surface_capture.json
blocker_resolution.fact: Required stage_advance_20 unit tests passed, and prior lane snapshot shows attestation passed plus rotation/fallback/rollback readiness fields, but repo-scope machine evidence still does not prove active_count_observed=20 with operator-approved live proof.

still_blocked_reasons.reason: Scale gate closure requires repo-scope operator-approved live proof for active_count_observed=20.
